parameters.query:
SELECT rr.id as retest_id, rr.finding_id, rr.engagement_id, nf.severity, nf.reopen_count, nf.title
FROM retest_records rr
JOIN normalized_findings nf ON rr.finding_id = nf.id
WHERE rr.id = '{{ ($input.first().json.body || $input.first().json).retest_id }}'

UPDATE retest_records SET
  result = '{{ $json.result }}',
  retest_evidence = '{{ $json.retest_evidence.replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  retested_by = '{{ $json.retested_by }}',
  notes = '{{ $json.notes.replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  completed_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.retest_id }}';

UPDATE normalized_findings SET
  validation_status = 'verified_fixed',
  remediation_status = 'verified_fixed',
  closed_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.finding_id }}';
UPDATE engagement_metrics SET
  verified_fixed = verified_fixed + 1,
  avg_mttr_days = (
    SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - first_seen))/86400),2)
    FROM normalized_findings
    WHERE engagement_id = '{{ $json.engagement_id }}' AND closed_at IS NOT NULL
  ),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE engagement_id = '{{ $json.engagement_id }}';

UPDATE normalized_findings SET
  validation_status = 'validated',
  remediation_status = 'reopened',
  reopen_count = reopen_count + 1
WHERE id = '{{ $json.finding_id }}';
INSERT INTO audit_logs (event_type, actor, entity_type, entity_id, payload)
VALUES ('retest_failed','wf16','finding','{{ $json.finding_id }}','{"reopen_count":{{ $json.reopen_count + 1 }},"severity":"{{ $json.severity }}"}'::jsonb);
UPDATE normalized_findings SET remediation_status = 'partially_fixed' WHERE id = '{{ $json.finding_id }}';

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: ($('Merge Retest Data').first().json.result === 'pass' ? '? *RECON OS - Finding Closed*
' : ($('Merge Retest Data').first().json.result === 'fail' ? '? *RECON OS - Retest FAILED - Finding Reopened*
' : '?? *RECON OS - Partially Fixed*
')) + 'Finding ID: ' + $('Merge Retest Data').first().json.finding_id + '
Result: ' + $('Merge Retest Data').first().json.result.toUpperCase(), username: 'RECON OS', icon_emoji: ':white_check_mark:' }) }}
